search_candidates.query: FUTR Lini Imaji Kreasi Ekosistem Tb annual report 2025 pdf official
search_candidates.title: 2025 Annual Report - TB Alliance | Putting science to work for better, faster TB cures.
search_candidates.content: TB Alliance | Putting science to work for better, faster TB cures. TB Alliance is working to revolutionize TB treatment, with consequent marked improvements in outcomes and experiences: on a path to one-day treatment for latent TB, one-month treatment for active TB, and ensuring access for all, especially those all too often left behind. In 2025, TB Alliance advanced its 1×1 strategy with a successful Phase 2 clinical trial of the SPaL regimen (a combination of sorfequiline, pretomanid, and linezolid) which outperformed standard treatment for both drug sensitive and drug-resistant TB. These results set the stage for a pivotal Phase 3 clinical trial to reduce treatment to four months for drug resistant TB, and which will then lead to a 1-month cure for all active TB with the application of long-acting injectable technology to the next-generation regimens.

search_candidates.query: FUTR Lini Imaji Kreasi Ekosistem Tb annual report 2025 pdf official
search_candidates.title: Global Tuberculosis Report 2025
search_candidates.content: # Global tuberculosis report 2025. The WHO Global tuberculosis report 2025 provides a comprehensive and up-to-date assessment of the TB epidemic and of progress in prevention, diagnosis and treatment of the disease, at global, regional and country levels. This is done in the context of global TB commitments, strategies and targets. The 2025 edition of the report is, as usual, based primarily on data gathered by WHO from national ministries of health in annual rounds of data collection. In 2025, 184 countries and areas with more than 99% of the world’s population and TB cases reported data. The core report document focuses on the main findings and messages. ## Read the main report findings and messages. The 2025 edition of the report is based primarily on data gathered by WHO from national ministries of health in annual rounds of data collection. This information sheet summarises key messages from the Global Tuberculosis Report 2025.
